methodology_description.text: Cross-country comparative analysis uses panel econometric methods: fixed effects, structural breaks (Bai-Perron), convergence tests, cluster analysis (4 fiscal archetypes), and Granger causality.

methodology_summary: WID Inequality Panel: Top income shares, Gini, wealth distribution from World Inequality Database. Source: WID.world (4.1 GB). Construction: direct. Coverage: global_180, 1900-2024.

citations.author: World Inequality Lab (Piketty, Saez, Zucman et al.)
citations.title: WID.world (4.1 GB)
